title: State Dept. scrambles to aid stranded Americans amid attacks, airport closures
author: Adam Taylor, Sammy Westfall
fullText: At least three U.S. embassies have closed since the Trump administration warned Americans in 14 countries to “LEAVE NOW” as Iran steps up retaliatory strikes.
summary: At least three U.S. embassies have closed since the Trump administration warned Americans in 14 countries to “LEAVE NOW” as Iran steps up retaliatory strikes.
